NAVAREA XIX 95/19
SEISMIC IN PROGRESS BY S/V EAGLE EXPLORER FROM SEPT 11 2019 UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE.  TOWING SEISMIC CABLE 10050 M LENGTH IN AREA BORDERED BY FOLLOWING POSITIONS:

A. 67-34.00N 007-20.20E
B. 67-36.20N 007-44.50E
C. 67-41.10N 007-59.80E
D. 68-00.00N 007-59.90E
E. 68-00.00N 006-56.70E
F. 67-47.90N 006-55.60E

GUARD VESSEL OCTOPUS IS WORKING TOGETHER WITH EAGLE EXPLORER. ALL VESSELS REQUESTED BERTH OF 2 MILES AHEAD AND ABEAM AND 7 MILES ASTERN. VESSELS KEEP WATCH ON VHF 16 AND 72.
